'''Liam Higgins''' (born {{Birth date|1983|7|19|df=y}}) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer. He previously played for [[Hull FC]], [[Castleford Tigers]], [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]] and [[Sheffield Eagles]]. His usual position is {{rlp|PR}}.<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org">{{cite web|url=http://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/liam-higgins/summary.html|title=Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org|publisher=rugbyleagueproject.org|date=31 December 2012|accessdate=1 January 2012}}</ref>

==International career==

Higgins qualifies for [[Serbia national rugby league team|Serbia]] through his Serbian Grandfather. He was called up to the Serbia squad for the first time to compete in the [[2013 Rugby League World Cup qualifying]] tournament.<ref>{{cite news|url=http://www.skysports.com/story/0,19528,12040_7176266,00.html|title=Higgins called up by Serbia|date=14 September 2011|work=Sky Sports|accessdate=8 June 2013}}</ref>
